purpose: Minimal single-controller end-to-end smoke network for baseline and controller-pipeline validation.

generator_intent.topology: single four-way crossing with attached boundary arms
generator_intent.traffic_light_policy: Only central junction A0 is signal-controlled; boundary attachment nodes remain non-signalized.
generator_intent.benchmark_demand_status: not generated here; frozen low/medium/high demand scenarios will be created later

revision_note: Initial generation used --default-junction-type=traffic_light and accidentally created five TLS controllers. The corrected generation explicitly sets only A0 as TLS-controlled.
source_config_route_policy: The source .sumocfg references an explicit empty route file so the generated network artifact is structurally complete and boot-runnable before final frozen benchmark demand scenarios are created.

accepted_artifact_status.benchmark_demand_status: not yet generated; frozen low/medium/high scenario bank comes later
